_doc: Cross-platform canonical for the compile-time domain allowlist (audit C2 / D3c-02). Each entry is the SHA256 of an approved suffix label (the hashed form — never the plaintext pre-image, per docs/claude/domain-allowlist.md). The same list + remote URL are hardcoded in three places (JS src/utils/domain-verification.ts, Kotlin helper/BackgroundConfigWorker.kt, Swift ios/core/BackgroundConfigRefresh.swift). src/utils/domain-allowlist-sync.test.ts reads all three sources plus this file and asserts they are byte-identical, so a change to one that the others don't mirror fails make test.
